prompts:
STYLE BLOCK: Visual Layout: Full-width seamless single scene, NO TEXT anywhere. Background: Create a soft gradient - use Purple #7C3AED and Blue #2563EB converted to very soft PASTEL versions, blended with cream (#FFF9F0). Keep it subtle and elegant. Center Composition: Multiple high-fidelity 3D glassmorphism objects floating in balanced composition across full width. Futuristic glass materials with inner glow effects, light reflections, floating particles. Premium Apple-style aesthetic. Several schematic glass elements at different depths creating layered composition. Format: 16:9 horizontal (1920x1080 pixels). Zero cartoonish elements. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Topic to Publish - One topic becomes a full SEO article.
Main 3D Object: A large glassmorphism document/page rising from a luminous vortex of swirling idea particles in blue and purple tones.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass pen floating mid-air emitting light streams; a translucent SEO graph panel showing abstract rising curves.
Third element: A glass publish button with a subtle glow pulse emanating outward.
Floating glass particles and light orbs connecting the objects.
Soft radial glow at center, neural connection lines between document and graph.
Vibe: Transformation, creation, polish.

REQUIREMENTS: Background must be predominantly cream with subtle pastel accent - NOT vibrant or rainbow. Strictly follow the visual style from reference images. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT anywhere in the image - pure visual composition only. Multiple glassmorphism objects creating depth and visual interest. Professional SaaS marketing quality. Clean visual hierarchy.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: URL to Publish - Repurpose any content into ranked articles.
Main 3D Object: A glassmorphism chain-link icon dissolving into cascading blue-to-purple data particles that reassemble into a clean luminous document silhouette.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass browser window frame with abstract content lines; a translucent arrow showing transformation flow.
Third element: A glass funnel capturing scattered web fragments and outputting structured content beams.
Floating glass particles and light orbs along the transformation path.
Network hop lines bridging chain link and document states.
Vibe: Transformation, repurposing, intelligence.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Turbo Article - Lightning-fast SEO articles in seconds.
Main 3D Object: A stylized glassmorphism lightning bolt composed of flowing data streams and glowing particle trails, erupting from a central point.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass speed rings like a sonic boom frozen mid-burst; a translucent article page materializing instantly.
Third element: Glass clock face with hands spinning rapidly, showing speed.
Floating glass particles and energy sparks around the bolt.
Bright core luminosity fading into soft shadows at edges.
Vibe: Speed, power, efficiency, instant results.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Trend Scan - Multi-source intelligence in one sweep.
Main 3D Object: A glassmorphism multi-layer HUD (heads-up display) with floating translucent panels showing abstract waveform graphs and pulse lines.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass radar disc emitting concentric scan arcs; multiple glass data source icons (globe, signal tower, chat bubble) at different depths.
Third element: A central radial scanner pulse emanating outward with quadrant divisions.
Floating glass particles representing data points being captured.
Layered depth and glow effects creating comprehensive intelligence feel.
Vibe: Surveillance, comprehensive scanning, real-time intelligence.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Trend Scout X - Catch viral X trends before competitors.
Main 3D Object: A sleek glassmorphism radar dish sending out concentric arc waves across the scene, with bright leading edges.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass data nodes scattered in space, illuminated as radar waves pass through them; one node pulses brighter than others (hot trend flagged).
Third element: A glass bird silhouette (abstract, not logo) representing social signal.
Floating glass particles and signal pulses connecting radar to nodes.
Purple accent glows trace the highlight lines on discovered trends.
Vibe: Discovery, real-time reconnaissance, competitive advantage.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Trend Scout Reddit - Community intelligence for content.
Main 3D Object: An upward-pointing glass arrow composed of stacked layered glowing threads progressing from blue to purple, rising from a community-node cluster.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass interconnected orbs forming a web of discussion nodes; a glass upvote arrow with inner glow.
Third element: A translucent community hub sphere with fine connection lines radiating outward.
Floating glass particles rising upward with the trend signal.
Collective intelligence converging into single actionable signal.
Vibe: Community, surfacing trends, organic intelligence.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Gap Generator - Find where competitors rank and you don't.
Main 3D Object: A large glassmorphism puzzle field where most pieces glow cohesively, but one prominent gap in center is highlighted by a bright outlined void radiating golden-purple light.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass analysis grid with scanning lines measuring the gap; translucent competitor silhouette panels in background.
Third element: A glass magnifying lens hovering over the gap, focusing light into it.
Floating glass particles and measurement lines around the gap area.
Faint grid coordinates suggesting AI analysis of the missing content.
Vibe: Precision, opportunity, competitive intelligence.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Micro-Post - Scroll-stopping social copy instantly.
Main 3D Object: A compact glassmorphism speech bubble floating at center, radiating concentrated pulse of blue-to-purple light from within.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass ripple rings expanding outward from the bubble like broadcast pulses suggesting massive reach; tiny glass social platform icons at ring intersections.
Third element: A glass megaphone silhouette amplifying the bubble signal.
Floating glass particles riding the ripple waves outward.
Contrast between tiny bubble and large ripple effect - small input, large output.
Vibe: Impact, engagement, reach, virality.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Lead Magnet - Generate lead magnets that convert.
Main 3D Object: A sleek glassmorphism horseshoe magnet with blue electric energy coursing along its poles, oriented horizontally at center.
Secondary 3D Objects: Glass document/PDF shapes drawn toward the magnet trailing purple particle streams; translucent email envelope icons gravitating inward.
Third element: A glass download arrow with inner glow indicating deliverable content.
Curved luminous field lines arcing between documents and magnet showing attraction force.
Radial gradient glow at magnet core suggesting irresistible pull.
Vibe: Attraction, value, conversion, lead generation.

FEATURE DESCRIPTION: Feature: Content Ingestion - Turn any URL into structured content.
Main 3D Object: A wide-mouthed glassmorphism funnel centered in frame, rendered in translucent blue glass material.
Secondary 3D Objects: Diverse abstract data streams pouring in from top - glass chain links (URLs), document shapes, play button (video), audio waveform - all in varied blue shades.
Third element: A single clean structured beam of solid purple light emerging from funnel bottom, representing organized output.
Floating glass particles of raw content being processed and refined.
Haze of diffused light around funnel showing active processing.
Vibe: Processing, refinement, transformation, structure.
